# Auto-generated walkthrough guide

# south Family Zoo By Sharpee Tutorial Type HELP for instructions. Main Path A
#   wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo.
> south
# open lunchbox You open lunchbox. Inside the lunchbox you see juice box.
> open lunchbox
# look in lunchbox In lunchbox you see: juice box.
> look in lunchbox
# close lunchbox You close lunchbox.
> close lunchbox
# east Petting Zoo A cheerful open-air enclosure filled with friendly animals.
> east
# open dispenser You open feed dispenser, which is empty.
> open dispenser
# take dispenser feed dispenser is fixed in place.
> take dispenser
